title: India LPG Flows Continue As Tanker Crosses Hormuz, Iranian Cargo Reaches Mangalore
description: Earlier this week, two LPG carriers, BW TYR and BW ELM, carrying combined LPG cargo of about 94,000 tonnes have safely transited the region. While BW TYR reached Mumbai on March 31, BW ELM docked at New Mangalore on April 1
